[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A phone screen is shown with a messaging interface displaying a chat bubble and a text action menu.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a dark, blurred background behind a user interface containing a chat message bubble and an action menu with selectable options.

Setting:
This appears to be an indoor, low-light view of a smartphone screen. The background is mostly dark with soft, out-of-focus light spots, suggesting the camera is pointed at a screen in a dim environment. The screen shows a time indicator at the top.

Visual Details:
At the top of the screen, there is a status bar with signal/Wi-Fi style icons on the left, the time “23.15” centered near the top, and a battery indicator on the right showing “70%”. Near the middle top portion, there is an emoji reaction bar with several circular emoji icons in a row, including a face with a teardrop/crying expression, a blue face with teeth, a smiling/yellow face, a white heart outline, a red heart, and a yellow face with a tongue-out smile; a plus icon appears at the end. Below the emoji bar is a chat bubble with white text on a dark background, and beneath it is a menu panel. The menu panel lists options in white text on a dark gray background, with small white icons on the right side of some lines. One option label is highlighted in red.

Visible Text:
23.15
70%
iq nya itu loh 🥲
Beri Bintang
Balas
Teruskan
Salin
Hapus
Lainnya...

Practical Summary:
The image shows a smartphone messaging screen with an emoji reaction row and a message bubble. A dark action menu is open with options such as replying, forwarding, copying, and deleting.

# Notes
- Some icon glyphs are present but not labeled; only the accompanying text was extracted.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
